zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Peede於1566年9月22日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，她的父親John Peede21歲，母親Elizabeth Howells17歲。她和Richard Watkins至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在英國賀福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Peede于1566年9月22日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，她的父亲John Peede21岁，母亲Elizabeth Howells17岁。她和Richard Watkins至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在英国賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Peede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Weede): habitational name for someone from a place called Weede (see Weeda ).

variants.name: Weed
meanings: English: nickname for an irascible person, from Middle English wed(e) ‘mad, crazy’. The name is also possibly from the Middle English noun wede in one of its senses, ‘weed’ or ‘garment, habit’.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Peede was born on 22 September 1566, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Peede, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Howells, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Richard Watkins. She died in Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Peede est née le 22 septembre 1566, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Peede, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Howells, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Richard Watkins. Elle est décédée à Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Peede am 22. September 1566 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Peede 21 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Howells 17. Sie hatte mit Richard Watkins mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Peede è nata il il 22 settembre 1566 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Peede, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Howells, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Richard Watkins. Morì nel Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Peedeが1566年9月22日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Peedeは21歳，母Elizabeth Howellsは17歳であった。彼女はRichard Watkinsとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Peede(이)가 1566년 9월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Peede(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Howells(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Richard Watkins(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 허퍼드실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Peede nasceu em 22 de setembro de 1566, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Peede, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Howells, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Richard Watkins. Ela faleceu em Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Peede родилась 22 сентября 1566 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Peede было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Howells, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Richard Watkins. Она умерла в местности хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Peede nació el 22 de septiembre de 1566, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Peede, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Howells, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Richard Watkins. Murió en Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
